hero.subtitle: We design and develop websites, applications and custom software with deliberate precision — where every decision has a reason.

quote.text: The mental representation of that which does not yet exist in the physical world, but is already real in the mind.

about.title: Why Phantasia
about.body_1: For Epictetus, phantasía (φαντασία) is not fantasy — it is the mental representation of something that already exists with full force in the mind, whether perceived, thought, or imagined. Not illusion: the most real form an idea can take before it exists in the world.
about.body_2: That is exactly our work: taking the image you have in mind — your idea, your business, your vision — and making it real through code.
about.etymology: From ancient Greek φαντασία (phantasía): imagination, mental image, apparition.

items.name: Websites
items.description: From high-impact landings to complex corporate platforms. Designed to convert, with precise visual identity and impeccable user experience.

items.name: Applications
items.description: Web and mobile platforms that solve real problems. Dashboards, SaaS, internal tools — built to scale with your business.

items.name: Custom Software
items.description: Custom systems that adapt to your unique processes. Automation, integrations, specific business logic — without compromises.

steps.title: Listen and understand
steps.description: Before writing a single line of code, we understand your business, your users and the real problem you need to solve.

steps.title: Proposal and architecture
steps.description: We design the technical and visual solution — stack, structure, flows — with clarity and justification for each decision.

steps.title: Design and prototype
steps.description: We build the visual before developing. Every screen validated with you before moving to code.

steps.title: Iterative development
steps.description: We work in short cycles with frequent deliveries. You see progress in real time, not just at the end.

steps.title: QA and launch
steps.description: Exhaustive testing on real devices and browsers. Clean deploy, no surprises on launch day.

steps.title: Post-launch support
steps.description: We don't disappear on delivery. We accompany the project, fix what comes up and evolve with you.

pricing.title: Investment by service
pricing.note: All prices in CLP. Exact quote based on requirements.

onboarding.sidebar_body: Answer a few questions and we'll send you a personalized proposal in less than 48 hours.

footer.tagline: The image your mind conceives, made code.
